positive: Minimalist celestial animal profile, a stylized leaping fox silhouette against a vibrant cosmic nebula backdrop. The fox is rendered in crisp, solid black ink, sharply contrasted against the deep teal and violet gradient of the space art. The nebula features swirling clouds of magenta, gold, and sapphire blue, speckled with small, geometric constellations and glowing orbs. Art style should be highly graphic, vector illustration quality, modern esoteric, perfect for a t-shirt print. Central composition, clean edges, highly detailed negative space.
negative: photorealistic, logo, text, watermark, dirty, grainy, blur, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noisy, sketch, cartoon, low detail
